Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessCandidateGenerator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessCandidateGenerator
public class ProcessCandidateGenerator extends Object
Generates process candidates from a ProcessResearchSpec.

The first implementation combines template-like built-in candidates with process-network operation options and reaction-route options. Generated candidates are represented as NeqSim JSON definitions so they can be built deterministically by ProcessSystem.fromJsonAndRun.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

      operationOptions - process-network operation options used to build the synthesis graph

      unitName - terminal unit name
      option - terminal operation option
